blockingIssues.description: Interactive install path in cli/src/cli.ts routes to interactive(undefined, targets) without category support filtering, allowing unsupported artifact-target combinations to proceed without warning+omit behavior.

runInstall in cli/src/interactive.ts always executes installHooks/installSubagents for selected items regardless of unsupported selected targets, so `af install --agent codexcli` can still install unsupported categories in TTY flow.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented AF_SKIP_RULESYNC_EXEC=1 usage in .factory/library/environment.md as test-only behavior for deterministic runs.
Documented absolute CLI script path requirement when integration tests change cwd in .factory/library/user-testing.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify validator command policy so equivalent aggregate runs (e.g. `bun test cli/tests/`) are explicitly accepted or rejected, and require handoffs to map evidence to required suites.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: install-scoping-rules-language-policy review observed skill requires explicit unit/mock/real commands while worker used aggregate command and still marked followedProcedure true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit interactive verification evidence (`interactiveChecks`) for features that modify interactive flows; when omitted, workers must mark followedProcedure false with justification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: install-scoping-unsupported-combinations-policy review found no interactive verification evidence despite skill procedure requiring it and followedProcedure reported as true.

rejectedObservations.observation: The transcript skeleton ordering alone proves a strict tests-first violation in install-scoping-agent-selection-and-defaults.
